topics.title: East Palo Alto Two Years Homicide-Free — What It Means For Home Values

priority_axes.note: Strong across all three — reason this ranks #1.

topics.time_decay_note: Story broke April 17 — ship by April 29 or lose news window.
topics.justification_notes: Breaking news pinned to Monday. Counter-narrative story the Peninsula media isn't covering. EPA +1.7% YoY vs SMC -7.2% YoY — rare blue-ocean data angle. GSC shows 15+ home-value queries for Peninsula cities getting zero clicks from your site — content gap you can rank for.

topics.justification_notes: Reddit r/bayarea saw 4 threads in the last 7 days asking 'is the market crashing or are bidding wars back'. Your IG data/market content is your #1 performer (1,720 avg reach vs 892 for listing content). Buyer decision-stage question with OFFERS keyword CTA ready.

topics.title: Woodland Park Just Got Approved for 772 New Units — What It Does to EPA Prices

priority_axes.note: Strong brand moment — local authority play. Moderate business (awareness-stage for most readers).

topics.time_decay_note: Approval this week — local relevance window ~2-3 weeks.
topics.justification_notes: City council approved the 772-unit development this week — zero competitor coverage yet. However, CONFLICT: shares market (EPA) + pillar (5) with Topic #1. Recommendation: keep both but split angles — #1 is 'safety → home values,' this one is 'new supply → price pressure.' Different buyer concerns.
